meaning: n.覆盖,多云的天adj.阴天的,阴暗的,愁闷的,忧郁的vt.使阴暗vi.阴暗起来
examples: For three days it was overcast.
The weather forecast is for showers and overcast skies.
And bowling conditions could suit England's swing bowlers, with weather forecasts indicating overcast conditions in Birmingham.
While the time wasn't the fastest of the overcast morning, Orb scored big on style points.
